description_long: This object is a compact, square-shaped electronic device with rounded corners and a sleek, dark metallic finish. The top surface features a prominent Apple logo, indicating it is an Apple Mac Mini, a small form-factor desktop computer. The rear side is equipped with a variety of ports, including power, HDMI, Ethernet, USB-A, USB-C/Thunderbolt, and a headphone jack, all neatly arranged in a horizontal row. The front and side surfaces are mostly unadorned, with a small status LED on the front and a power button on one side. The device's exterior is made of smooth, hard metal, likely aluminum, with some plastic components for the ports and internal electronics. Its compact size and minimalist design make it suitable for placement on desks, shelves, or other flat surfaces in urban environments.
description: A compact, dark metallic Apple Mac Mini desktop computer with a sleek finish, multiple rear ports, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: The rear view shows all connectivity ports, including power, HDMI, Ethernet, USB-A, USB-C/Thunderbolt, and a headphone jack.
description_view_1: The left side view is mostly featureless, showing the smooth, rounded edge and part of the power button area.
description_view_2: The front view displays the Apple logo on top and a small status LED on the lower right corner.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the power button and the device's clean, unbroken surface.
